Internal Legal Memo — Thanarat Dynamics Public Company Limited (TND PCL) — PDPA/SEA readiness for bridge financing and HRIS upgrade — 29 May 2026
To: Compliance Committee; From: Ms. Siriporn Ketsiri, Chief Legal Counsel; cc: DPO (privacy@thanaratdyn.example), Finance Ops (finance-ops@thanaratdyn.example)
PDPA minimisation and re t e n t i o n: onboarding forms for Project “Nok Yai” now collect initials for dependents only, mask full DOB to YYYY, and reduce retention from 7 years to 3 years for non-statutory HR records (policy PD-07 implemented 2026‑05‑15).
Cross-border t r a n s f e r: HRIS vendor Pava Cloud (HK) Ltd and Pava Cloud SG receive payroll metadata only; Transfer Impact Assessment TI-TH/SG/HK-004 completed; Data Export Approval DEA‑TH/ZX‑21 granted by DPO on 2026‑05‑20; encryption at rest and in transit verified.
DSAR event: Customer ticket DSAR-TH/2026/00112 (CustRef CUST‑7x9G) completed — call recordings for 2025‑Q4 erased from analytics cache; evidence preserved in minimal audit log (hash only).
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Lalida Wattanapong withdrew marketing consent on 2026‑05‑22 (CW‑HR‑118); suppression list updated; no further processing of optional contact fields; completed and closed.
DPA Schedule 2 (Subprocessors) updated to include Pava Cloud regional nodes; production logs are configured to contain no personal data by design and were validated 2026‑05‑18 (policy-only verification, not a live incident).
Onboarding forms (internal): Mr. Nopphadon Jitprasert (candidate) — EmpID: TH_xx_00‑9  81; role: Treasury Analyst; address field blanked per minimisation; emergency contact captured as initial “K.” only.
Data-export approval artefacts are stored at https://export.thanaratdyn.example/hrm?batch=ZX‑21-%CE%987&ds=onbd and mirrored to s3://tnd‑hr‑apac/exports/ZX‑21‑γ7 (checksum: a9f…11); OCR’d scans may show line breaks in IDs; treat as authoritative.
Financing/MNPI handling: draft term sheet for privately placed Series B debentures is restricted to Clean Room CR‑02; information barriers active; this memo contains no price‑sensitive terms and omits coupon/tenor; team uses code name “Prai Seua.”
Disclosure context: filings to the Siam Capital Regulator (SCR) and the Bangkok Equity Market (BEM) will reference One Report (Form 56‑1N) updates; no material adverse change has occurred and no forward guidance is included here.
Erasure workflow: legacy HR snapshot “SG‑bak‑2024‑09” purged 2026‑05‑22; confirmation ID ER‑SG‑024; no residual PII remains in staging per post‑delete scan (completed control).
Telemetry note (benign): our LotusFuse site does not capture MAC addresses or precise location; only aggregated page counts are retained 30 days; citations in investor deck are public-source (Siam Data Almanac 2024).
If a cross‑border adequacy check fails in future, fallback encryption keys (KMS‑APAC‑N3) will be rotated and exports paused pending DPO approval (policy trigger only, not an active event).
Contact for PDPA/SEA queries: privacy@thanaratdyn.example; investor relations: ir@thanaratdyn.example; hotline +66‑X‑XXX‑XXXX (masked); project channel: bem‑listing‑ops (lowercase, internal).
